scripts.deploy: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rsync -av --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='frontend/node_modules' --exclude='data/' ./ geir@192.168.1.88:~/agent-babysitter/ && ssh geir@192.168.1.88 'cd ~/agent-babysitter && npm ci --omit=dev && sudo systemctl restart agent-babysitter'
